'''竏喞h-zh-g''' ('''kachazhag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:modernize|modernize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-zh-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:modernize|modernize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏喞h-zh-g
|-
! Lemma
| kachazhag
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichazhag|thichazhag]] || [[word:jichazhag|jichazhag]] || [[word:shichazhag|shichazhag]] || [[word:kichazhag|kichazhag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchazhag|thuthuchazhag]] || [[word:jujuchazhag|jujuchazhag]] || [[word:shushuchazhag|shushuchazhag]] || [[word:kukuchazhag|kukuchazhag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchazhag|thuchazhag]] || [[word:juchazhag|juchazhag]] || [[word:shuchazhag|shuchazhag]] || [[word:kuchazhag|kuchazhag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchazhag|thuchazhag]] || [[word:juchazhag|juchazhag]] || [[word:shuchazhag|shuchazhag]] || [[word:kuchazhag|kuchazhag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechazhag|thechazhag]] || [[word:jechazhag|jechazhag]] || [[word:shechazhag|shechazhag]] || [[word:kechazhag|kechazhag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochazhag|thothochazhag]] || [[word:jojochazhag|jojochazhag]] || [[word:shoshochazhag|shoshochazhag]] || [[word:kokochazhag|kokochazhag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochazhag|thochazhag]] || [[word:jochazhag|jochazhag]] || [[word:shochazhag|shochazhag]] || [[word:kochazhag|kochazhag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochazhag|thochazhag]] || [[word:jochazhag|jochazhag]] || [[word:shochazhag|shochazhag]] || [[word:kochazhag|kochazhag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦchazhag|thﾃｦchazhag]] || [[word:jﾃｦchazhag|jﾃｦchazhag]] || [[word:shﾃｦchazhag|shﾃｦchazhag]] || [[word:kﾃｦchazhag|kﾃｦchazhag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachazhag|thathachazhag]] || [[word:jajachazhag|jajachazhag]] || [[word:shashachazhag|shashachazhag]] || [[word:kakachazhag|kakachazhag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachazhag|thachazhag]] || [[word:jachazhag|jachazhag]] || [[word:shachazhag|shachazhag]] || [[word:kachazhag|kachazhag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachazhag|thachazhag]] || [[word:jachazhag|jachazhag]] || [[word:shachazhag|shachazhag]] || [[word:kachazhag|kachazhag]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shachazhag|shachazhag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshachazhag|goshachazhag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishachazhag|gokishachazhag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shachazhagnﾃｼ|shachazhagnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshachazhagnknﾃｼ|goshachazhagnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishachazhagnﾃｼ|gokishachazhagnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shachazhagshﾃｫ|shachazhagshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshachazhagnkshﾃｫ|goshachazhagnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishachazhagshﾃｫ|gokishachazhagshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachazhagro|shachazhagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachazhagnkro|goshachazhagnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachazhagro|gokishachazhagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shachazhagmu|shachazhagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachazhagnkmu|goshachazhagnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachazhagmu|gokishachazhagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shachazhagsher|shachazhagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshachazhagnksher|goshachazhagnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishachazhagsher|gokishachazhagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shachazhagng|shachazhagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshachazhagnkng|goshachazhagnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishachazhagng|gokishachazhagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shachazhagya|shachazhagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshachazhagnkya|goshachazhagnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishachazhagya|gokishachazhagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shachazhagyam|shachazhagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshachazhagnkyam|goshachazhagnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishachazhagyam|gokishachazhagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachazhagnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shachazhagnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachazhagnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshachazhagnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachazhagnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishachazhagnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachazhagnﾃｼro|shachazhagnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachazhagnknﾃｼro|goshachazhagnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachazhagnﾃｼro|gokishachazhagnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachazhagnﾃｼmu|shachazhagnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachazhagnknﾃｼmu|goshachazhagnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachazhagnﾃｼmu|gokishachazhagnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachazhagshﾃｫnﾃｼ|shachazhagshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachazhagnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshachazhagnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachazhagshﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishachazhagshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachazhagshﾃｫro|shachazhagshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachazhagnkshﾃｫro|goshachazhagnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachazhagshﾃｫro|gokishachazhagshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachazhagshﾃｫmu|shachazhagshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachazhagnkshﾃｫmu|goshachazhagnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachazhagshﾃｫmu|gokishachazhagshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachazhagronﾃｼ|shachazhagronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachazhagnkronﾃｼ|goshachazhagnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachazhagronﾃｼ|gokishachazhagronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachazhagroshﾃｫ|shachazhagroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachazhagnkroshﾃｫ|goshachazhagnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachazhagroshﾃｫ|gokishachazhagroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachazhagromu|shachazhagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachazhagnkromu|goshachazhagnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachazhagromu|gokishachazhagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachazhagmunﾃｼ|shachazhagmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachazhagnkmunﾃｼ|goshachazhagnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachazhagmunﾃｼ|gokishachazhagmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachazhagmushﾃｫ|shachazhagmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachazhagnkmushﾃｫ|goshachazhagnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachazhagmushﾃｫ|gokishachazhagmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachazhagmuro|shachazhagmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachazhagnkmuro|goshachazhagnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachazhagmuro|gokishachazhagmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki active verbs]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
